en: A: How did you get here?
I came on foot.
A: What kind of car did you take?
B: I came by bus.
A: How do you go to church?

ab: Tama nak ma-unting Laihlaih mama’ zaku.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.
A: How does he usually go to school?
B: He trains to school.

ab: Maquaq suu Bai a mabaliv sanglav?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?
B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.
A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: Na tundaza aak qatu munhan Pangkalkalan.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.
A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: Na tun-daza aipa Hikuki’ munhan Pangkalkalan.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.
A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?
B: He took a train to Kaohsiung.
A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Uu, Tundaza aipa Laihlaih munhan Tai-tu.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.
A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Nii, Tundaza aipa Hikuki munhan Tai-tu.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.
A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: Haiza, Munhan ngaus a na usaduan in aas papanduan Vasu.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: paka iti isaq a mishuan i papanduan Laihlaih?
ch: A:離這裡最近的車站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest station to here?

ab: Uka iti papanduan Laihlaih, Lusqa maqtu tun Hai-ia.
ch: B:這裡沒有車站，你只能坐計程車
en: B: There is no station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: Pan laquaq a Vasu pansan Kaku?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?
B:15 minutes to school.

ab: Piaq tinun dazan tukii pasan Taiciu?
ch: A:搭要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung?
B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: Unting laihlaih pasan U-lai ka talmadia?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?
B: It takes about an hour.

ab: Tundaza aas Vasu munhan lumaq nak na talmadia?
ch: A:你搭公車來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to take the bus to my house?
B: It takes 20 minutes.
A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?
B: I can ride a bicycle.
A: Do you have a motorcycle?
B: I have a motorcycle.
A: Do you have a motorcycle?
B: I don't have a motorcycle.
